abilities.name: Grinding Halt (Tome)
abilities.description: Immediately gains Armor +2 for duration of Action.

actions: (1) Mining Pick (Heavy Melee) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage.
(2) Pneumatic Drill (Pneumatic) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 4/5/7 damage, ignoring Armor.
system.notes: M&SU most common mining construct. Reliable if clumsy. Bore through solid stone. Pressed into combat service.
